summary: Role-based delete permissions for room types and services on /agency-content page - ALL TESTS PASSED. Admin users see delete buttons with confirmation dialogs, staff users cannot see delete buttons at all.

Admin (demo@hotel.com) can see delete (trash) buttons on services - PASSED

Clicking 'Vazgec' closes dialog without deleting - PASSED
Clicking 'Evet, Sil' removes the room type from the list - PASSED
Service delete dialog shows 'Hizmeti Siliyorsunuz' title - PASSED

Staff user (frontdesk@hotel.com) CANNOT see delete buttons for services - PASSED

critical_code_review_comments: canDelete variable correctly checks for 'super_admin' or 'admin' roles at line 30
AlertDialog properly wraps delete buttons with confirmation flow
Delete buttons are conditionally rendered with {canDelete && ...} pattern
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role-based delete permissions fully working on /agency-content page. Admin users (super_admin, admin roles) see delete buttons with confirmation dialogs. Staff users (front_desk role) cannot see delete buttons at all. Add buttons remain visible for all users. Implementation uses canDelete = ['super_admin', 'admin'].includes(user?.role) check.
